title: Stellar Algorithms & Problem Solving
subtitle: LeetCode, Skillrack, & CodeChef Starters
description: Solidified programming foundations. Solved over 1,200 problems on Skillrack and 300+ on LeetCode. Achieved CodeChef 4-Star status and Bronze problem solver credentials.

title: Machine Learning Specialization & Certifications
subtitle: IBM & Google Pathways
description: Deep dived into deep learning concepts. Earned credentials from Google and IBM. Programmed models using PyTorch and TensorFlow for complex object tracking and computer vision pipelines.

title: Monocular Depth Estimation Launch
subtitle: Deploying Ignus A3D on Jetson Edge Devices
description: Constructed Ignus A3D using the MiDaS DPT-Hybrid framework. Integrated YOLOv8 object detection, Deep SORT tracking, and dynamic multilingual voice warnings (English/Tamil) via Edge TTS.

title: Autonomous Excavation Rover Engineering
subtitle: ROS2 Humble & OAK-D Lite Kinematics
description: Engineered Exelerate XD, a physical autonomous sand excavator. Integrated RTAB-Map SLAM for real-time 3D localization, AprilTags for visual markers, and custom velocity-driven motor actuation.

title: National Hackathons & Autonomy Finals
subtitle: CAT Autonomy Challenge & Caterpillar Tech-a-thon
description: Placed in the Top 11 nationally at Shaastra CAT Autonomy Challenge (IIT Madras). Ranked Top 10 out of 2,250+ teams in Caterpillar's Tech-a-thon and secured second place at SECE Creatathon.
